title: SBN Overwinter
description: Modpack for vanilla servers. It includes mods for communication, improving performance and quality of life.
body:
## **SBN Vanilla ModPack**


### Client side only vanilla modpack for best experience on minecraft servers. It improves performance, quality of life and adds social interaction features by mods such as Emoticraft and Plasmo Voice.

#### Preformance mods
- Sodium
- Starlight
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Lithium
- ImmediatelyFast
- Krypton
- LazyDFU
- Memory Leak Fix
- Very Many Players
#### Social mods
- Emotecraft
- Plasmo Voice
- Chat Heads
- Not Enough Animations
#### Quality of life mods
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Advancement Plaques
- Bobby
- Iris Shaders
- Continuity
